title: Rust/Python Meshtastic bridge port-set mismatch
description: rust/lichen-meshtastic/src/bridge.rs:272-322 and lib.rs:16-17 implement IP_TUNNEL_APP (portnum 33) encapsulation of LICHEN IPv6 with hop_limit 3; Python translate.py:32-46 PortNum enum has no IP_TUNNEL_APP — Python logs 'Unknown portnum 33' and drops, so the two bridges cannot interoperate on tunneled packets. Also note spec/07-transport-app.md:92 rationale: 'Meshtastic RF handled at BLE compatibility layer, not mesh transport... tunneling buys nothing — the radios don't interoperate anyway.' VERIFY scope: if BLE-local only, hop_limit=3/tunnel framing is misleading; if RF tunneling is intended it contradicts the stated design. Fix: align both implementations on one port set and document whether IPv6-over-Meshtastic is sanctioned.
